dialogueChunks.intro: Bad news, {player_name}. The situation just got more complicated.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A rival collector heard about the {quest_item} and sent their own team to {quest_focus} {location_hint}. They're stripping the area clean and they're not above violence. {target_npc} spotted them setting up a guarded camp. Their activity has stirred up the {enemy_type}. We need to {quest_action} fast, before the competition or the creatures make it impossible.
dialogueChunks.outro: Speed matters now more than ever. Get in, gather what you can, and get out.

playerResponses.text: Competition doesn't scare me. I'll be faster.
Rival teams and angry monsters? This just doubled in difficulty and so should my pay.
Too many parties fighting over the same prize. I'm out.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I wish I had better news to greet you with.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {quest_item} you brought back isn't the right quality. The impurities make it unusable for {quest_stakes}. {target_npc} says there's a purer vein {location_hint}, deeper underground where the {enemy_type} are thickest. The cave system is unstable. Our efforts to {quest_action} need to go deeper.
dialogueChunks.outro: I'm sorry to send you back out. But without the right materials, everything we've done so far is wasted.

playerResponses.text: Unstable tunnels and monsters? Just another day. I'll find the pure vein.
Back into the caves for a second round. This is getting old.
I already risked my neck once. Find another source.

dialogueChunks.intro: Stop, stop, stop. Before you unpack, {player_name}, we have a problem.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: While you were out gathering, someone broke into the workshop and stole the {quest_item} I had already processed. Weeks of work, gone. {target_npc} saw a cloaked figure heading toward the old mill {location_hint}. I suspect it's someone who knows the value of {quest_stakes}. We need those processed materials back, and more raw {quest_item} to replace what can't be recovered, to {quest_action}.
dialogueChunks.outro: I'll reinforce the workshop. You track down the thief and recover what you can.

playerResponses.text: A thief? I'll find them and bring everything back.
Stolen goods on top of monster runs? My rate just went up.
Your security problems aren't my concern.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the route you've been using is gone. Completely impassable.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A rockslide buried the trail {location_hint} overnight. The only alternative cuts through forest thick with {enemy_type} this time of year. To make it worse, the remaining {quest_item} we had stored was damaged by moisture. We need to replace it all and find a safe way through to {quest_action} and salvage {quest_stakes}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Nature and bad luck keep piling on. But giving up now means losing everything we've invested.

playerResponses.text: Blocked trails and ruined stores? I'll carve a new path and restock everything.
Every step forward, something knocks us two steps back. Fine, I'll manage.
The universe is telling us to quit. I'm listening.
